channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Crypto crashed six months ago: Have markets improved, or are bears still in charge?
item.description: The October 2025 Bitcoin and altcoin crash may have ended the bull market, but its long-term impact on market health may have been overstated.

item.title: Musk’s SpaceX holds $603 million in bitcoin despite $5 billion loss stemming from xAI
item.description: Arkham data shows 8,285 BTC in Coinbase Prime custody as the company swings from $8 billion profit to nearly $5 billion loss ahead of its IPO push.

item.title: Bitcoin price analysis sees new short squeeze as open interest nears $25B
item.description: Bitcoin open interest hit five-week highs while funding rates mimicked the BTC price collapse below $60,000, leading analysis to predict a new short squeeze.

item.title: Bitcoin signals potential seller exhaustion as realized losses decline
item.description: On-chain data points to easing selling pressure, with realized losses falling and spot markets shifting toward net buying.

item.title: Messaging push notifications are a privacy attack surface, says Durov
item.description: The comments followed recent reports that law enforcement officials retrieved deleted Signal messages through device push notification logs.

item.title: The crypto honeymoon is over for now as analysts warn of a major first-quarter profit squeeze
item.description: Several major investment firms have preemptively downgraded Coinbase and other platforms as a sharp drop in trading activity and falling token prices threaten to derail upcoming first-quarter earnings results.

item.title: $1.6 billion Ether Machine SPAC deal collapses over unfavorable market
item.description: The Ether Machine, an ether treasury firm, currently has more than $1 billion in ether in its treasury.

item.title: 'Not Going to Stop at Bitcoin': Morgan Stanley Weighs Tokenization, Tax Solutions in Crypto Push
item.description: Morgan Stanley’s Amy Oldenburg signaled that the Wall Street giant’s crypto journey has a long way to go.

item.title: Bitcoin, broader market flat as U.S.-Iran negotiations begin
item.description: The market rose over the week after a two-week ceasefire was announced, triggering a derivatives short squeeze that wiped out over $430 million in bearish positions.

item.title: Iran war oil-price shock revives inflation trade and a new stablecoin play
item.description: As oil shocks revive investor anxiety, stablecoins solved payments, but not purchasing power, says Michael Ashton, who's USDi token aims to fix that.

item.title: New Tools Aim to Make AI 'Vibe Coding' Safer for Crypto
item.description: A new initiative by Matterhorn and the ASI Alliance adds auditing tools and safety checks for AI-generated smart contracts.

item.title: Crypto perpetuals predict the direction of Wall Street’s Monday open with 89% accuracy, data shows
item.description: Over half (57%) of Monday market opens is s already reflected in crypto markets' perpetual futures products.

item.title: Crypto Clarity bill has 30% chance of passing this year, Wintermute’s Hammond says
item.description: Wintermute’s head of policy Ron Hammond pegs chances at 30%, citing political friction, stalled negotiations and shifting timelines despite signs of progress.

item.title: Bitwise files updated S-1 for Hyperliquid ETF as HYPE fund race heats up
item.description: HYPE has surged around 200% over the last 12 months. Other asset managers including Grayscale, 21Shares, and VanEck are also eyeing HYPE-linked ETFs.

item.title: Economists Said AI Wouldn’t Take Jobs—Some Now Admit They Got It Wrong
item.description: A new multi-university study surveyed 69 economists, 52 AI experts, and 38 superforecasters. All three groups agree: faster AI means fewer jobs.

item.title: Reality of AI’s impact on employment clashes with C-suite optimism
item.description: While some proponents believe AI will bring about an employment boom, so far its effect has been to dampen entry-level hiring while delivering mixed results on productivity.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Paying Iran in crypto could put shippers at sanctions risk: Chainalysis
item.description: Crypto’s transparent ledger makes sanctions evasion easier to trace, allowing authorities to track and potentially freeze illicit flows.

item.title: The bitcoin market is splitting in two. Here's who is buying and selling amid the war
item.description: Six weeks of war have revealed that bitcoin's floor depends entirely on a handful of mandated buyers absorbing what everyone else is trying to get rid of.

item.title: 🔥 INTERESTING: The majority of Bitcoin's supply hasn't moved in years. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBrTmp3azJuSTdqZVZRNHR1Tmx1RzM2VW1BRlpnMzE2VzBhX0ZOcUdLb0NaMG9aR3lNaVlMNU4zbnN6U3RYRmVKQWtXeW1OMVEyeTBrTXkwZE5HdlU3dEJ5NHBUSUI?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 INTERESTING: The majority of…

item.title: Trump-linked WLFI hits new low as token-backed loan triggers concern
item.description: WLFI fell to a record low after it was revealed that the project used billions of its own tokens as collateral to borrow $75 million in stablecoins.

item.title: 🚨 ALERT: Bullish crossover for #Bitcoin on the MACD (weekly timeframe). This does NOT mean the bear market bottom is in. It happened 2 times during the 2022 bear market too. • 1st time: -60% • 2nd time: -40% It's unlikely Bitcoin will see such a deep correct - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9vZlZwUHFGdGhLbDltRmhXdmxSeHc2VGh0WGtfQ2V0eWlkWTNKRHBzQjRMZVRyQkdVSUh3OGlodFB1Q0t4UV9jTjluMG8yZ1ZUcm5GWXFuOFByZ3l6cjJBek5B?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 ALERT: Bullish crossover for #B…

item.title: 💥BREAKING: BlackRock buys $612,000,000 worth of #Bitcoin. Huge buys 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1jWjhPcGxULXMxajhYV2pkc3JIU0toQVhVTlpFQXpDQkZxQ25MUUZrNnI0b1NQc251NHh0enREbWRTa1lycnJMQzZ3dktZdTBYRlR6clMzOTlvT0F3ZHZydlZn?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: BlackRock buys $612,00…

item.title: Federal court blocks Arizona crackdown on Kalshi’s event contracts
item.description: A federal judge in Arizona has temporarily barred state officials from enforcing gambling laws against Kalshi, siding with the CFTC.

item.title: Bitwise edges closer to Hyperliquid ETF launch with second amended filing
item.description: Bitwise added the ticker $BHYP and a 0.67% management fee in its latest filing, signaling a potential launch soon, according to Bloomberg's senior ETF analyst.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Bitcoin ETFs bought 3,350 BTC worth $240M yesterday. Total holdings now at 721,090 BTC worth $56.75B. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBLWml1a2xvWFlZVzlkN0xieDQxVkZmLWlfSlVIcWt2ZVNWbDh4SE5FQ21YdjBOMTNZR2N1TWxQNjZNU3hEcHRKRlVXWGx2elFmcnNEcW1MZk1oRFhvTUM5dVRn?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Bitcoin ETFs bought 3,…

item.title: XRP price bottom signals emerge after the altcoin holds key support level
item.description: Technical and onchain indicators hint at a possible trend reversal in XRP price as traders watch to see if a key support level holds.

item.title: Bhutan has sold 70% of its Bitcoin holdings over the past 18 months. Bhutan has sold 70% of its Bitcoin holdings over the past 18 months. Arkham data reveals that the country's stash has dropped from roughly 13,000 BTC in October 2024 to the current 3,954 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE51bjNmY2VsQTd5MmtueU9zTmxWazc5aThpOUFFbUpPaWZ0MDEyMl9lUU50MDBYUkI3bVRyaVhpNV9FSkoteVAxc0M5dHp5dHNXQzEtby16b2hmMGotYkVqdjVBQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Bhutan has sold 70% of its Bitco…

item.title: THE ETHEREUM FOUNDATION IS SELLING The Ethereum Foundation just sold 1250 ETH for $2.80M in DAI. The Ethereum Foundation has stopped staking ETH and has started selling ETH. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBPWHRYOWttSFBpS0otdVlJcDI0bXY5YmNHMURMX3U1aU1WZEI5V3JSWU9VSzdoaFNubmhuNXdscGVnaVVlV2N6V3JEcTFjLV9jaHBMYnVWWDNEOHM?oc=5" target="_blank">THE ETHEREUM FOUNDATION IS SELLING The Ethe…

item.title: CFTC unveils innovation task force members in crypto clarity push
item.description: The CFTC’s task force includes five members with legal and crypto backgrounds to help "clear rules of the road for American innovators."

item.title: Bhutan has sold 70% of its bitcoin in 18 months. It may have stopped BTC mining too.
item.description: The kingdom's holdings have dropped from 13,000 BTC to 3,954 since October 2024, with $215.7 million moved out this year alone. Its last mining inflow over $100,000 was recorded more than a year ago.

item.title: Anti Bitcoin Community Community on X - 31 Members - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5MVFF3NnlMZ0V3QjdGOXh0dzgyYWN1YVpXWmNEdWVBWGp0SVFGeUtIbXlaT2J3WjFiRlR0ci10NHFZRHBNSi0ybHlVUGZlVUNqMzVndHBTS1pmNTg?oc=5" target="_blank">Anti Bitcoin Community Community on X - 31 …

item.title: Federal judge blocks Arizona from bringing criminal charges against Kalshi
item.description: Judge Michael Liburdi ordered Arizona not to bring any enforcement actions under state law against Kalshi, at least temporarily.

item.title: Bitcoin community weighs in on reports of Iran's crypto toll for oil ships
item.description: Alex Thorn, an executive at crypto investment firm Galaxy, said it is monitoring onchain activity for signs of an oil tanker fee paid in BTC.

item.title: This 'Space Invaders' Clone Game Pays Real Bitcoin—If You're Skilled, Lucky or Rich
item.description: A new free-to-play web game based on an arcade classic will give you the chance to earn real Bitcoin—but it won't be easy.

item.title: Prediction market users await Artemis II mission splashdown
item.description: The 10-day lunar flyby mission is expected to end in a splashdown landing in the Pacific Ocean on Friday evening.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Barron Trump has reportedly made $80 MILLION from Bitcoin and crypto investments – Forbes Not even 21 yet and he's already touched $100M. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5TOTFyWXA1UDJHVThSMS1ZQkpfRUpMOHlzTVdzMFBVSFE0QklzNFJwNmlPN0RiemtQTFFRZ2hEekNnSXZtbDVObFZhYkRyMnNQeXlFbFFZX3JsLUZNMzdldmNn?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 Barron Trump has reportedly m…

item.title: CoreWeave lands multi-year agreement with Anthropic to run AI workloads
item.description: CoreWeave said the agreement means it now serves nine of the 10 major developers of large language models for artificial intelligence.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Will Bitcoin secure safe passage through the Hormuz Strait?
item.description: Iran may require oil tankers to pay BTC tolls through the Strait of Hormuz, signaling a new use case for crypto as geopolitical tensions reshape global trade routes.

item.title: Bitcoin charts point to $80K in April: Here’s how it may happen
item.description: Technical analysis, overhead supply awaiting absorption, and a shift in investor sentiment have increased the likelihood of Bitcoin reaching $80,000 in April.

item.title: Suspect Arrested After Molotov Cocktail Thrown at Sam Altman’s San Francisco Home
item.description: Police say a 20-year-old man also threatened to burn down OpenAI’s headquarters shortly after the incident.

item.title: Coinbase CEO backs US Treasury Secretary‘s push to pass CLARITY Act
item.description: The public statement came about three months after the CEO said Coinbase could not support the crypto bill “as written“ before a crucial committee vote.

item.title: NEW: Investment bank giant TD Cowen predicts Bitcoin to hit $140,000 this year and issues "BUY" rating for BTC treasury companies Nakamoto and Strive. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1WMjlwNlJIVVNOMmFuVW5QQkpIb213RVVkOVliOVlfOTZVYWxKQm9xNG5tOWRSODZXT2FySWtlZm8xN3hqcDg4cFJIOUN4c1VxSjJoR0VwTllBZkhuY3hNNjNFNzJTbGM?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Investment bank giant …

item.title: Gen Z Thinks AI Is Rotting Their Brains, But Can't Stop Using It: Survey
item.description: AI usage among Gen Z is up, but excitement over the technology is way down—so are feelings of “hopefulness.”

item.title: Price predictions 4/10: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, LINK
item.description: Bitcoin bulls spent the week stampeding toward a critical overhead resistance level, which, if breached, could restart the bull market in BTC and altcoins.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Is Nearing Its $1.75 Trillion IPO—Bitget Is Offering Pre-IPO Exposure
item.description: Bitget's new IPO Prime platform debuts with a Republic-issued token offering exposure to SpaceX's eventual public market performance.

item.title: The CIA Let AI Write Its First Intelligence Report—And AI 'Coworkers' Are Up Next
item.description: CIA leadership confirmed the agency used AI to generate its first-ever autonomous intelligence report—and expect to use full AI agent teams.

item.title: Elon Musk’s xAI Sues Colorado Over AI Law as Fight Over State Regulation Intensifies
item.description: Elon Musk’s AI company xAI is challenging Colorado’s new high-risk AI law, adding to mounting legal scrutiny around its Grok chatbot.

item.title: Bitcoin traders set $88K target as market bias finally tilts toward bulls
item.description: Bitcoin holding above $72,000, along with a sharp uptick in whale activity, suggests traders may target the supply zone at $88,000.

item.title: Iran’s Strait of Hormuz Crypto Toll: An Evolution of Tehran’s Expanding Use of Digital Assets
item.description: TL;DR Bloomberg reported on April 1, 2026 that Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) was already extracting transit tolls from… The post Iran’s Strait of Hormuz Crypto Toll: An Evolution of Tehran’s Expanding Use of Digital Asset…

item.title: Zcash Could Rise to $420 After 62% Weekly Price Spike, Traders Predict
item.description: Privacy-focused coin Zcash is soaring higher than Bitcoin. Myriad predictors think ZEC is likely to keep rising after a massive gain.

item.title: Exodus Rolls Out 'Exodus Pay' to Turn Bitcoin Wallet Into Spending App
item.description: The feature lets users spend crypto directly from a self-custodial wallet.

item.title: US CPI comes in lower than expected, but April rate cut still unlikely
item.description: Although US inflation was weaker than expected in March, the ongoing war between the United States, Iran and Israel has fueled macroeconomic uncertainty.

item.title: Powell, Bessent Warn Banks About Security Risks From Anthropic's Mythos AI: Bloomberg
item.description: Treasury and Federal Reserve officials reportedly alerted banks to cybersecurity risks tied to Anthropic’s advanced new Mythos AI model.

item.title: Trump-Linked WLFI Erases $427 Million From Market Cap on DeFi Loan, Token Unlock Proposal
item.description: Onlookers expressed concerns that Dolomite’s protocol could be stuck with bad debt if World Liberty’s loans were unwound.

item.title: Star Xu calls CZ a ‘liar’ as founders of world’s largest crypto exchanges argue over past allegations
item.description: The dispute between the crypto exchange founders, which included a $1 billion wager from CZ, revives allegations dating back 11 years to Zhao’s time at OKCoin.

item.title: BitTensor AI Token Plunges as Top Builder Departs Over Decentralization Doubts
item.description: BitTensor's native token, TAO, has fallen more than 18% amid public fallout between a leading subnet operator and the AI network's founder.

item.title: The magic word for digital assets adoption and success: choice
item.description: For the digital asset ecosystem of the future to flourish, investors need options, explains Sullivan.

item.title: LATEST: ⚡ Bitcoin can be made quantum-safe today without a protocol upgrade, though each transaction could cost $75 to $150 in GPU compute, according to StarkWare’s Avihu Levy. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1nVk1yUjhtREpIMEFhUzkxbWtxSkRsZlcxb2tJWm9VZy13YXBqY3JQU1ktZ24yWVYxNE9VZVhKZUpBMndOLVIwY19sMFY1N3RPSEtUQ05IUUI4N3dSdkwtSEp2UmQ?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: ⚡ Bitcoin can be made q…

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Breaks $73K as Strategy's STRC Bid Grows
item.description: Strategy's STRC is buoying the Bitcoin bid, Galaxy stock is ripping, and Scott Bessent told the Senate to pass the Clarity Act—with Brian Armstrong chiming in.
